name: Arabian Centres Company
summary: Arabian Centres Company develops, owns, and operates contemporary lifestyle centers in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It operates a portfolio of 21 lifestyle centers in 11 cities, which comprise approximately 4,300 retail stores. The company also builds, leases, and sells buildings; and engages in the construction of commercial buildings, including demolition, repair, excavation, and maintenance works. In addition, it is involved in the maintenance and operation of commercial centers, tourist resorts, hotels, and restaurants; and managing and operating temporary and permanent exhibitions, compounds, and hospitals. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
